result.markdown: --- title: "Week 7: Measuring and improving performance" --- ::: {.cell} ::: ## Main references * [23-24. *Advanced R*](https://adv-r.hadley.nz/perf-measure.html) * [Efficient R Programming](https://csgillespie.github.io/efficientR/) ## What you will learn this week * Profiling code * Measuring code performance * Vectorisation * Caching results ## Pre-class activities * Watch [Advanced R Book Club: Measuring and Improving Performance](https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=pOaiDK7J7EE) ## Slides for week Download pdf ## Assignments * [Assignment 2](../assignments/A2.qmd) is due on Tuesday 05 May.
